32333.title: Antiques Roadshow
32333.description: The team is at Buckfast Abbey, a Benedictine monastery on the edge of Dartmoor in Devon. Finds include a glorious tiara, a teddy bear with an intriguing secret, and a silver platter that is not all that it seems.

32334.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
32334.description: Frank and Lu investigate a death threat at Runningbrook, an exclusive tennis club which hides a toxic threat.

32335.title: Father Brown
32335.description: Father Brown uncovers secrets, hypocrisy and murder at a finishing school for young ladies.

32336.title: Ordinary Lies
32336.description: On the surface Joe seems to have the perfect family life. But when a sneaking suspicion turns into him installing CCTV in his home, he finds that the truth is a bitter pill to swallow.

32337.title: Antiques Roadshow
32337.description: The team is at Buckfast Abbey, a Benedictine monastery on the edge of Dartmoor in Devon. Finds include a glorious tiara, a teddy bear with an intriguing secret, and a silver platter that is not all that it seems.

32338.title: Impossible
32338.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

32339.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
32339.description: Frank and Lu struggle to protect a troubled teen who suffers from nightmarish premonitions of murder.

32340.title: Bargain Hunt
32340.description: Charlie Ross steers the show, which comes from the British Motor Museum in Warwickshire. Experts Richard Madley and Thomas Plant help the blue and red teams navigate the antique and collectors' fair, before they head off to the auction in Lichfield.

32341.title: Bad Move
32341.description: Nicky and Steve's dreams of peaceful country nights are shattered by Grizzo and his band rehearsing his latest album outdoors.

32342.title: Keeping Up Appearances
32342.description: Hyacinth gets excited when she learns that her next-door neighbour Emmet is rehearsing an amateur production of the musical `The Boyfriend'.

32343.title: Doctors
32343.description: It's a big day for Valerie, but Karen has forgotten something important. When a documentary film-maker visits the prison, Daniel helps a young inmate who is struggling to find his way out of the system.

32344.title: EastEnders
32344.description: Ruby tells Martin she has made her mind up, Mick and Linda have a choice to make, and Keegan's good news leaves Tiffany feeling disheartened.

32345.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
32345.description: Frank and Lu struggle to protect a troubled teen who suffers from nightmarish premonitions of murder.

32346.title: Bargain Hunt
32346.description: Charlie Ross steers the show, which comes from the British Motor Museum in Warwickshire. Experts Richard Madley and Thomas Plant help the blue and red teams navigate the antique and collectors' fair, before they head off to the auction in Lichfield.

32347.title: Impossible
32347.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

32348.title: Bargain Hunt
32348.description: Anita Manning hosts from Epsom Racecourse in Surrey with experts Danny Sebastian and David Harper. The blues are after golden gavels while the reds are spending big. Meanwhile, Anita finds out about the fascinating history of Epsom racecourse.

32349.title: Bad Move
32349.description: Nicky and Steve's dreams of peaceful country nights are shattered by Grizzo and his band rehearsing his latest album outdoors.

32350.title: Keeping Up Appearances
32350.description: Hyacinth gets excited when she learns that her next-door neighbour Emmet is rehearsing an amateur production of the musical `The Boyfriend'.

32351.title: Bargain Hunt
32351.description: Eric Knowles presents from the grounds of Kedleston Hall in Derbyshire with experts Danny Sebastian and Jonathan Pratt. Two sets of mums and daughters battle it out to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction, while Eric finds out about Derby's industrial heritage.

32352.title: Doctors
32352.description: It's a big day for Valerie, but Karen has forgotten something important. When a documentary film-maker visits the prison, Daniel helps a young inmate who is struggling to find his way out of the system.

32353.title: EastEnders
32353.description: Ruby tells Martin she has made her mind up, Mick and Linda have a choice to make, and Keegan's good news leaves Tiffany feeling disheartened.

32354.title: Impossible
32354.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

32355.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
32355.description: Frank and Lu investigate a case of culinary sabotage when a restaurant owner accuses a food critic of giving him an undeserved bad review.

32356.title: Bargain Hunt
32356.description: Anita Manning hosts from Epsom Racecourse in Surrey with experts Danny Sebastian and David Harper. The blues are after golden gavels while the reds are spending big. Meanwhile, Anita finds out about the fascinating history of Epsom racecourse.

32357.title: Bad Move
32357.description: Nicky and Steve are alarmed to discover that an ancient public right of way runs through their garden. Grizzo is preoccupied with a new tapping craze.

32358.title: Keeping Up Appearances
32358.description: Hyacinth still wants to join Emmet's production of `The Boyfriend', but fortunately for him, other things have to take priority.

32359.title: Doctors
32359.description: It's a big day for Valerie, but Karen has forgotten something important. When a documentary film-maker visits the prison, Daniel helps a young inmate who is struggling to find his way out of the system.

32360.title: EastEnders
32360.description: Ruby tells Martin she has made her mind up, Mick and Linda have a choice to make, and Keegan's good news leaves Tiffany feeling disheartened.

32361.title: Impossible
32361.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

32362.title: Antiques Roadshow
32362.description: The team is at Buckfast Abbey, a Benedictine monastery on the edge of Dartmoor in Devon. Finds include a glorious tiara, a teddy bear with an intriguing secret, and a silver platter that is not all that it seems.

32363.title: Doctors
32363.description: It's Valerie's 50th birthday and a celebrity is in town. When their plans go awry, Emma and Luca find themselves sharing more than they expect.

32364.title: EastEnders
32364.description: Sonia lets her guard down as Nancy and Frankie meddle in Shirley's love life. Tiffany's insecurities cause her to make a snap decision. Callum feels helpless, and Jean has some advice for Ruby, who feels like giving up.

32365.title: Mary Berry Cooks
32365.description: Mary Berry is cooking dishes for a family celebration. She makes it seem almost effortless, with recipes for beef and mushroom stew with mustard mash, salmon en croûte with a foolproof salad, and chocolate and orange panna cotta.

32366.title: Call the Midwife
32366.description: The team tries to unite an estranged mother and daughter who are both pregnant. Also, Trixie's friend is devastated to discover she is pregnant.

32367.title: Summer of Rockets
32367.description: Hannah arrives at Buckingham Palace, but is too late to be presented. Samuel meets two men who are interested in his invention: Denning and Mr Field. He learns that they are from MI5 and he is sworn to secrecy, and the Petrukhins attend a fete at the Shaw's.

32368.title: Father Brown
32368.description: The Kembleford Ramblers' annual outing takes a tragic turn for the worst when the local lord is found strangled.

32369.title: Mary Berry Cooks
32369.description: Mary Berry is cooking dishes for a family celebration. She makes it seem almost effortless, with recipes for beef and mushroom stew with mustard mash, salmon en croûte with a foolproof salad, and chocolate and orange panna cotta.
